summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Nurekha AI chat automation SaaS. Backend APIs are fully functional (18/18 tests passed), but frontend authentication has critical issues preventing proper login flow.

integration_issues.issue: Login form submits but fails to authenticate - stays on login page with loading spinner
integration_issues.details: Login form accepts credentials but 401 errors in console suggest authentication flow is broken. Backend login API works correctly via direct testing.

integration_issues.issue: Session cookies not being properly set or maintained
integration_issues.details: Consistent 401 errors when trying to access protected routes suggest session/cookie management issues

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend authentication flow. Backend APIs work perfectly but frontend login fails with 401 errors. Check: 1) CORS configuration for credentials, 2) Cookie settings (httpOnly, secure, samesite), 3) Frontend API call implementation for login, 4) Session token handling in React app. The issue appears to be in the frontend-backend integration for authentication, not the backend APIs themselves.
